CONTENT.Personal life: Dingert lives in Lebecksmühle, near Kaiserslautern, and has been married since 2008.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at dfb.de (in German)Profile at worldfootball.net
CONTENT.Refereeing career: He has been a full international for FIFA since 2013.

SUMMARY: Christian Dingert (born 14 July 1980) is a German football referee who is based in Lebecksmühle. He referees for TSG Burg Lichtenberg of the Southwest German Football Association. He is a FIFA referee, and is ranked as a UEFA second category referee.
